## twoway() function

Marks a writable store as a two-way binding. This means all updates to the store will update the widget control (one-way), and all updates to the widget control will update the store in return (two-way).

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function twoway<T>(store: WritableStore<T>): TwoWayBinding<T>;
```
